dialogues.text: dude you look terrible. like actually. are you sleeping? anyway — can you spot me twenty?
dialogues.yes_response: you're the best. seriously. also drink some water you look like a ghost.
dialogues.no_response: no worries man I'll ask somebody else. but seriously get some sleep.

dialogues.text: okay I know you've had a lot going on. I respect that. I'm not going to ask about it. twenty?
dialogues.yes_response: legend. also I'm here if you ever want to talk. I know I don't say that enough.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's cool. you've got enough going on. I'll sort it.

dialogues.text: I feel like we haven't hung out in forever. I miss you dude. also I need twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: okay but we're actually hanging out this week. I mean it this time.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's fine. we'll figure it out when things calm down for you.

dialogues.text: remember when you used to call me back? we were so young. twenty bucks?
dialogues.yes_response: I'm kidding. kind of. not about the twenty though.
dialogues.no_response: okay fair. I'm still kidding. mostly.

dialogues.text: I heard something second-hand and I didn't want to bring it up but like — are you okay? twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: okay. okay. I'm not going to push. I just — I worry about you.
dialogues.no_response: no I get it. just. I'm around. you know that right?

dialogues.text: you look like you haven't eaten. have you eaten? anyway. twenty. I'll buy you something.
dialogues.yes_response: okay we're getting food right now. non-negotiable. you need it.
dialogues.no_response: okay at least eat something later. I'm serious. you look rough.

dialogues.text: you're one of like three people I actually like. I hope you know that. also twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: I mean it. okay come on let's go do something I'm bored.
dialogues.no_response: you know I still mean the first part right. okay I'll get someone else.

dialogues.text: twenty. quick. I can't explain right now but I'll explain later and you'll totally get it.
dialogues.yes_response: okay I love you. don't make it weird. thank you.
dialogues.no_response: okay that's fair. I wouldn't explain either in your shoes.

dialogues.text: I know today's been a lot. I can see it on your face. I'm not going to ask. just twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: thank you. I'm here if you need anything. I know I'm asking for money but I mean it.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's good. hey. you good? like actually?

dialogues.text: you're the only person I can ask and I just — I don't want to lose track of you. twenty bucks.
dialogues.yes_response: hey. when this is all over — whatever this is — we're getting drinks. promise me.
dialogues.no_response: I'll figure it out. but hey. I mean what I said. don't disappear on me.
